extract: The Spear Pillar (Japanese: 槍の柱 Spear Pillar) is a location on the peak of Mount Coronet in Sinnoh where the Legendary Pokémon Dialga, Palkia, and Giratina are known to enter the region from their respective dimensions and from which, legends say, Sinnoh itself came from. It is the present-day ruins of the Temple of Sinnoh. As the Spear Pillar is part of Mount Coronet, it has a special magnetic field that causes Magneton and Nosepass to evolve into Magnezone and Probopass, respectively, when leveled up here.
